contents.text: Sky Attack uses limited crafting — many recipes are locked and must first be unlocked before they become available at the crafting table. Instructions on how to learn a recipe can be found in the wiki entry for each item.

Recipes are displayed as a crafting grid – just like you know from the crafting table. Each slot shows an item. Hover over an item to see its name. Clickable items will take you directly to the wiki entry for that material.
